review_text: I use this product daily, my only complaint is .... I use this product daily, my only complaint is it is not a big jar...only 10 baths per jar. It helps with my fibromyalgia pain
Five Stars. Its ugly, cheap, and does the job.

it melts like normal and seems to be the same product. I just got my second jar today, and it had a few very slight differences from the first. First, the scent isn't as strong as it was in the first jar. But that's not really a huge issue. Second, the top layer was a bit clumpy. However, after you warm it up, it melts like normal and seems to be the same product, and the consistency is normal under the top layer. I assume that the clumpiness was just due to the way it was stored. I was worried that it was fake because of some of the reviews on here. I would suggest checking the seller before you buy since some of the sellers don't have great ratings. Just my two cents to avoid getting a bad product.
Five Stars. The dead skin rolls right off!
My new favorite. I was a little worried that this would make my hair oily because my hair is on the fine side.  But it hasn't, and I love it!

I always had bad heels.. I always had bad heels ... Scrapers and pedicures didn't do much .. Used these socks overnight and was surprised that I could feel the difference within one use.
Used it after scrapping my heels with foot scraper .. Took shower and applied Vaseline and put on the socks ! Woke up to healed feet!
They work!!. I have actually used these for awhile. They make my hair grow so fast! I stopped using them and regretted it! So I found them and bought some more!

Should’ve bought it sooner!. I thought I had blepharitis and used eyelid wipes that dried out and irritated the skin around my eyes. Now I believe it’s just eczema and using this spray twice daily has completely knocked out the bothering itchiness around my eyelashes and some of the rash has completely gone. Skin feels moisturized and the tiny bumps and redness on the inside of my eyelids have disappeared. I saw a Dr for this condition two years ago and the only advice they gave me was to wash my eyes with soap and water and use hydrocortisone. Never helped! This spray is amazing!!!

No more green. My sister in law (a hair stylist) recommended me buying & using this product to get rid of the green that was showing up in my hair.  For months I didn't buy this product because I didn't like the price at the stores.  Came across the shampoo & conditioner while shopping for other things & I have to say, I should have bought this when I was told.  It works!!! I no longer have that chlorine green hair!
Works fine. Wife says she likes it but doesn't love it.

Pure perfection has become a bit rough but still my go-to.. I was on a 2-month trip in Europe back in 2006 when I made a very rare visit to a barber to shave my head and he had this trimmer. I bought one off him and have had 3 since then. I haven't found anything better as far as power, speed, sharpness, closeness of blade, portability, size, etc. One star off is only because in my most recent purchase, the blade hasn't been as smooth and I've had cuts or skin irritation. I actually had to send it back and the new one is only marginally better. Previously it was just as smooth as can be.

Also, the challenge has always been getting parts / blades at a reasonable price since I don't believe a north american version exists. Still my go-to trimmer. Keep it oiled. You'll need a small outlet adaptor to charge it in the US. (not a voltage converter, just the cheap outlet adaptor that converts European outlets to US outlets)

It worked!. I’m on week 2 of using this and I notice a huge change already!  This is so much different than just using a clear topcoat. I clean up my nails, cut them short, filed the peeling sections down & applied. After the end of the week I followed the instructions to take off. I cleaned up my nails again & re-applied. I can just tell after a few weeks the thin nails, broken ends & peeling i had will be grown out. As for the reviews that complained of a burning sensation, yes, my one cuticle had a small cut. I felt a short burning sensation which went away in mins. Since this is not your typical nail polish, it shouldn’t be applied heavily if you have broken skin around your nails, however the burning is short lived as the product dries quickly.
My long hair is a tangly mess and takes a .... My long hair is a tangly mess and takes a long time to comb out. This conditioner is magic! The tangles are gone!!
nice color, but doesn't last. great color, but it washes out too quickly compared to other brands

Be careful. This product is amazing as it removes impurities from your face! But be careful not only does it remove all the nasty stuff but your fine hairs as well! It's very painful to remove so I don't recommend this for people who take accurate or retain A OR who have sensitive skin!
Revived damaged hair. Saved my hair from damage caused by over processing. Smells greats!

Potent to reduce knee pain. I applied this oil on my knees due to chronic knee pain and my pain vanished like a miracle. I have had pain for years and one application of this Dabur Vatika was simply unbelievably remarkable in making my knee pain disappear. I highly highly recommend this for anyone with chronic knee pain.

Lovely color but unstable and difficult to use.. Love the color and how it looks when applied.  The problem is that the pencil isn't stable and the color point drops out of the crayon quickly.  It falls out.  And there is no way to sharpen this color.  It is too fragile.
A decent classic.. One of the classics and I'm glad I tried it. I tend to use it when I don't have as much time to lather up a normal soap. The scent is kinda like cherries, but not super sweet.
No lever. Excellent product but of course I was expecting it to have a lever, but this has no lever. it is just one level, although the right level to cut bald style.

The only mascara I'll use. I have been using this mascara for years, and unfortunately I have no longer been able to find it in stores. I have very straight lashes and this is the only product that keeps them curled. I also have no issues with it clumping.

Not easy; but worth it.. My feet did peel. But, the dead skin did not peel off in giant, immensely satisfying, sheets; it tiny-flaked off all over the place. Which was, actually, kinda of satisfying but also, very messy.
Needs a couple of days before use. I really like the size of these, but they have a bad chemical smell. I put them on a hanger for about a week and the smell went away.

Everyone needs one of these! Was able to get .... Everyone needs one of these!  Was able to get at least 5-6 more days out of my Urban Decay foundation by using this little gem.  Makes a big difference especially when you're spending $40+ on product!

Dissapointed!!!!. Disappointed. I read some of the other negative reviews and ignored them. Should not have done that. This item does not have the same fragrance as the same product in the store, or that of a friend of mind. I understand that fragrance smell different on body types. But right out of the bottle? Disappointed. Not much more to say.
First choice. Healed the cuts on my lip on the first night will still use it till my lips are no longer chapped.

It does give my fine hair volume...but. unfortunately this makes it hard to comb through my hair, which results in pulling and loss of hair.  It does feel sticky and gummy somehow.  I'm sad to say for this reason.

Hurt like a B, but worth it.. Yo, so straight up, this did peel off some of my skin (but I think my upper cheekbones were a little dry in all fairness). It was painful to remove, and that seems to be a product issue, not a user or application issue. But, did it work? Heeellllllllll yes. Not like some of the pictures you see with loads of nasty muck on them (or maybe my pores are just that amazing, 'cause I am trying hard and have been for a few years now), but my pores were visibly clearer and smaller. I don't look forward to using this again becuase it just end with me in the shower crying, but I know it will do the job when I need it to.

Excellent product!. Tightens and tones my skin. I apply it in the morning and in the evening. Sometimes, I even use it on top of makeup foundation just to freshen up my skin. Has an unpleasant, slight acidic scent, but soon dissipates after a minute or so. I used this constantly when we went on a cruise to Mexico. I had four days of sun and didn't put foundation on --- just this serum. My skin glowed and the serum prevented sun damage.

Bugs Inside the Bottles. I was disgusted with finding dead ants and other black bugs inside these dirty bottles.  I ordered these last year with no issues.  But this batch was dirty, had bugs, and scrape marks.  Very disappointed and disgusted!

I've had no comments good or bad. I haven't used them, and have no plans to. We put these in a short term rental house, so the towels don't get stained. I've had no comments good or bad, but they keep disappearing and the towels stay clean.
Arrived damaged.. Excellent product, but mine arrived in damaged packaging with a damaged top—shampoo all over the place. I scraped it into another bottle for use.

I have learned that essential oils will make the bad chemicals leach out of the plastic into the deodorant. Wish they weren't plastic. But I can make deodorant with probiotics instead of essential oils.  I have learned that essential oils will make the bad chemicals leach out of the plastic into the deodorant.
Great formula. Great product! Love the formula but dont love the applicator. The applicator is not a fine tip so it can be difficult to get that sharp cat eye look.

Honestly, this stuff is life-changing.. Even before I was overweight, I had problems with painful chafing in my thigh area after long walks or running in the heat and humidity. I had no idea that products like this existed and used to just deal with the after-effects, which lasted hours or days after cleaning the area and keeping it dry with baby powder. Many years later, I finally broke down and Googled the problem, which led me to lots of solutions including this one.

Now that I live in Florida, I use this stuff daily. It's unobtrusive, lasts all day between showers (and sometimes beyond... as I found out when I went camping not too long ago). It doesn't smell and is not oily. I have not had a single incident of chafing ever since I started using it. I now run to keep my weight in check, and even in such extreme conditions, it protects my skin.

If you struggle with chafing, and particularly if you plan on physically exerting yourself in heat and humidity, this is the product you want. I honestly can't find a single con to using it.
Works well but smells awful. Moisturizing

Exploded. Went to use the clippers today, which have always been cleaned and stored. As soon as I plugged them in to charge they exploded my light socket and are now broken. Beyond aggravated and mad at a waste of money.
Four Stars. Works great but the placement of the buttons is bad because you accidentally press them wile using it.
Half of the pallet was broken. It’s really nice but arrived broken and when I use it it gets everywhere.

It works!. Started to notice my bumps clearing up after about 3 days of consistent use (morning and night). The following routine is what worked for me:
1. Cleanse your skin with a face wash of your choosing
2. Pat dry
3. Apply Tend Skin solution using cotton ball or soft cloth
4. Let your face air dry then apply a skin moisturizer of your choosing
5. Repeat morning and night

DO NOT SCRATCH YOUR SKIN! I know razor bumps are itchy, but scratching or picking at your skin will delay the healing process.
As someone who gets BAD ingrown toenails often. As someone who gets BAD ingrown toenails often, I can say that I'd buy this if it was twice the current price.

BUY IT!!!!!!!. Softer feet than getting an actual pedicure! Read the directions as it says light pressure and up and down movements not back and forth. It’s been several days and my feet still feel so soft!
The hair mask was damaged. My product was damaged when i received it. I was only able to use the shampoo and  conditioner

Absolutely disgusting... perfect. I've tried so many things to stop biting my nails. But the sour ones never bother me, spicy never bothers me, and other ones aren't potent enough to last more than a few hand-washes. This stuff though... IS HORRIBLE. Which is what I need. It is a terrible chemical taste, and it lingers in your mouth. I still have urges to bite but they're stopped as soon as i taste it.
Decent. Wigs styled and blended with my hair. Top was cut weird so that hairs stick up. Other than that the wigs I'd decent on hot stress less days.
Questionable as to real. My favorite wash but now afraid it’s not real thing!  My plastic surgeons office said it was fake so returning.  🤦‍♀️

Absolute must have!!!. This is my second time purchasing this cream and I look forward to many more. Where to even begin?? Color match is spot on. From my summer tan to winter pale, it covered all bases (though sometimes top powder was in order). When they say non clogging they mean it! Even fallen asleep without washing it if a few times and still swear by it! Pores=gone!!! Blemishes? Forget it! Is there anything this cream can't cover??

I originally wrote a good review of this product. I originally wrote a good review of this product. I automatically assumed that it was OK without investing the time to actually use it . Amazon has so far been great but you need to find out whats up with this product, I have seen other similar complaints. This lamp does nothing. I could spend an half under it and maybe get a little pink which is gone the next day. They may have used the wrong bulbs in these but it does nothing. Respectfully John Tyler

This is the only soap I use. Great body wash but this is the second time I have gotten it delivered with damages. First time the lids were unscrewed and the body wash had leaked all in the box. This time one of the lids was broken. This has got to get better. I hate that I can’t find it in any store so I have to order it.

It really works!. I wish I had taken a before and after photo of my nails. I made the awful mistake of getting acrylic nails and after I took them off my nails were so feathered and thin that it hurt to use them to open anything. I had read someone else’s review saying to only put one layer on and not to use it every day - I’ve followed that advice (re-applied every 3 days) and after only a week my nails are so much thicker and stronger. I’m going to have my mom start using this product because nothing has worked for her yet.
Color is easy off base. The color is more like an orange

Great for oily skin BUT causes breakouts. It definitely helped with my oily skin the best out of everything I have used but I had to discontinue using it because I began to get tiny little white heads on my face. To my dismay I found out it was this spray that was causing it. Won't be buying again.

Joico is a Jokeo. This product did absolutely nothing for me. It smells odd (weird perfumey fragrance) and it left my hair dry as a desert. The reason I buy products like this is to protect my hair...not leech the moisture from it.
Don't buy it. It's over priced crap.
I wish Ojon never discontinued their leave in.

Weak construction, but the combination of bristles and massage nodules is a therapeutic design.. The good: I received this brush exactly three weeks ago and used it in a navy-type shower the next day: Got my body wet and soaped up the brush, turned off the water, scrubbed all over with the brush, then turned the water back on and rinsed myself off. The brush felt fantastic, scrubbier and more invigorating than [[ASIN:B01KYQ97Y4 Buf-Puf Buf-Puf Body Sponge, 1 each by Buf-Puf]], which I've happily used until now. The brush exfoliated my winter-dry skin and made it feel soft and, incredibly, it helps my black-and-blues fade (I bruise easily) and makes my skin tighter. Without a doubt, it improves my circulation. If I don't use the brush in the shower, I feel like I've missed out. The bad: The brush is already coming apart (see pic). The white plastic disk is separating from the wooden base even though I don't exert pulling force on the base with the canvas strap. (I don't use the strap because it's too loose around my hand; I just grip the wood.) The brush is poorly made. I'm returning it and looking for a durable alternative.
Pretty at first sight….. This hair looks very pretty and feels super soft at first but it tangles and matted up. I’m using it for boho braids as the leave out hair.
Two Stars. I wear fair makeup with pretty much every brand of makeup. This was NOT a match, too orange/pink.

Pretty....but thats it.. I bought this case mainly for travel.  I thought it was a perfect size for that, fit all of my makeup/ brushes that I would need. It is a really pretty case, but the latch at the top is super flimsy....does not line up properly...seems as if the case fell over contents would fall out.  Also....it is hard to open up the accordion part of it....it opens to one side, and you really have to pull on it.  Once open...the case is lopsided so the whole thing falls over and you need to prop it up on something to hold it upright.  Super annoying.  Unfortunately I ended up returning!!!
Strong perfume smell. I like what this stuff does for my hair but the smell was wayyyy to strong and perfumy. It also set off my husband’s alergies.

Fake. I loved this scent. My local Body Shop closed so I took to their site and found they no longer made it (at least for this season of summer - I think this was more of a fall smell). So I came here and found what looked legit. Offered by the profile of Body Shop, and sold from and shipped by Amazon. I read the reviews saying what you get is fake, but I felt comfortable because of those latter things.

Nah. Got mine in today. 3 of the Sandalwood scents. The bottles are totally different, the color is clear (the real kind is a brown sort of color - almost like whiskey) and the smell is different. It's sharper and less pleasing. I uploaded a pic here myself. The left is the real one. The right is what I got from Amazon. Maybe this is Body Shop and they've just changed bottles/bottle art/scent/color, either way it's a massive bummer.

Great WHEN it works. When it works, it’s great. However, more often than not I spend time fighting with the product. It turns itself off and on nonstop so I spend more time fighting with this product than actually doing my nails.

No way to open it to put in a battery.  Instructions don't seem to do the opening.. If you can't get it opened to put in a battery, you can't use the product.  The instructions are a bit vague or else the case was super glued shut.  Don't waste your money.

Buy it! Just not from Amazon.. I got this product in a sample box and loved it. I bought it from Amazon and it is a lighter color and runny. I can't wash my hair multiple times and it never produced a sud. It seems the company changed its product for Amazon sales and its not good. Find a different place to buy it.
One Star. Its pretty but smells funny! And takes for EVER TO dry

Definitely not maximum protection.... I wanted to like this deodorant since it has a lovely scent. However it does not last very long at all. I could smell my natural funk come through within an hour or two. I keep this stick in my desk for emergencies, but it really doesn't offer maximum odor protection as promised. I had no allergic reaction to this nor did it stain my clothing.
One Star. Love this scent, BUT was old, meaning product was bright orange, not the light pink color it should be

Can't charge clients and feel good about my services while using this. Does not cure well.  I don't believe this is intended for professional use as stated in your description.  Wrinkles gelish while curing. Will not be using this anymore.  Can't charge clients and feel good about my services while using this.

Would not buy again. I was really excited to use this product because iv heard such great reviews and I was completely disappointed. I followed the instructions like I was supposed to step for step. The color was not what I was expecting though it was supposed to be a bright pink turned out to be a very light pastel pink (I wasn’t mad it was a very pretty color ). It stayed in my hair for about 2 days before it started coming out ( I don’t use any product in my hair because I don’t do anything with it except for brushing it and washing it every 3-5 days ) then today went to brunch my hair out and it turned my white shirt pink ! Almost like it was becoming a powder and falling out of my hair ( my hair never touched my shirt ) I won’t be using this product again and I wound 100% not recommend to anyone.

Watered down body spray.. Didn't expect alot from a $10.00 bottle of "perfume" , but this product should not have 4  1\2 stars to describe it. It is so faint of smell and doesn't last at all. Choose differently , it isn't Opium or anything like it.
Waste of money. I usually use batiste but decided to try this since I love all other Amika products however it made my hair super greasy! I can’t get a refund either. Waste of money :(

Not worth the money. This brush has made my skin so soft and combined with the mary kay clear proof system my skin is nicer then is has ever been, it stoped working after 3 monthes, contacted them and they said they would not replace it

Hot like🔥. Only used three times and the cord got extremely hot... like almost a fire hot. I turned it off and unplugged it to cool down (it sparked at the outlet) and it hasn’t worked since. I cannot find a way to contact the company other then leaving a review or asking a question publicly. If you buy, be mindful of the cord/outlet!

Let down. I use this brand eye cream and love it and with all the great reviews on this face wash I thought I'd give it a try. First of all the bottle is so tiny. I can't see it lasting more than a month and that's using it 1x a day. This wash leaves my skin feeling so oily. It's like putting oily milk on your face. I'm not a fan. I love supporting smaller businesses, especially if they are natural. But this face wash didn't live up to the hype for me

Somewhat an ok product. The reason why I gave this product 2 stars is because of the striping roll, it came apart easily, doesn't stay together so I can do my nails without the awkwardness of holding it together so the striping tape doesn't fall out.
Ehhhhh. Loved for the first few days and then I ripped after like the third day of wearing it
Not original. I doubt if this one is original. I have used original ones before.

Very strong smell!. The scent is overpowering! We are having a very hard time using this soap due to the strong scent. If you have asthma or anything like that I recommend you stay away from this scent. We do use the same brand sometimes but a totally different scent and very light.

New formula does not last. I bought more as i was on my last stick. with the new formula i gave it a try and it does not last me more then 6 hours sitting in a office! I have a desk job and now i have to reapply at lunch time. i still have a old stick from the last batch i bought and tried that, applying close to the same amount each time and testing it it would last all day and honestly sometimes i noticed it would last over night. New formula makes this something that you will go through it three times as fast. going to be looking for a new brand as i have been using this for over 10 years.
It's pretty much just black. Not really worth the money if you're looking for a real color to bring out green eyes.  It's pretty much just black.

4oz just like the image is saying and the 1. I feel so upset because the product's image is providing a total inaccurate description for what we are expecting to receive. I wanted to get the 3.4oz just like the image is saying and the 1.7oz was sent!!!! It was my birthday party and now I needed to get it purchased from somewhere else. Please take note, that if you are looking to get the big one, this is not going to be the best option!

No good for my beard. Everything seemed to be fine and looked to be a good replacement for my Wahl of the same design.  However, on further inspection the blade teeth are finer and do not cut beard hair well.  It often grabs the hair and yanks it.  Ouch.  Almost lost my temper with it.  Cut very fine hair well, fine.

... in my hair even with the purchase of the super clips. When you unroll the curler it leaves .... I have medium length hair & these curlers did not hold in my hair even with the purchase of the super clips. When you unroll the curler it leaves a kink in your hair from the super clip. Inferior product for medium hair, may be sufficient for very thin hair only.
Too wide to fit my shave holder. Also, the bristles are too long.  You really have to 'mash' it to your face to get a good lather.

Do not buy this!!. This is surprisingly difficult to use and i would NOT recommend it at all.  Also there is barely any wax so really not worth the money.  All of their other products come with smaller sticks to do your eyebrows.  It's easier, more user friendly and only twice the price for easily 4-5 times the product.  I would recommend their warm wax or organic wax (the organic is washable which is great if you get any on your clothes or the floor, which of course i did).  Both are way better of a product.  Would also recommend buying the warmer, honestly it changed my wax experience.  Didn't have to keep stopping and warming it in the microwave.  All of them cool surprising fast.  Also i am a beginner, if that helps but with the other products i did my legs first and by the end i felt like a pro.  Also waxing my delicate bits was easy and i wasn't scared after all the practice on my legs.  So i would recommend anyone who wants to try at home wax to start with legs.  But please do not waste your money on this product!

Have have beautiful 2 carat diamond earrings my mother left me and .... Fabulous idea and it worked except the hole loosened up and won’t stay secure on the post! Have have beautiful 2 carat diamond earrings my mother left me and would be devastated if I lost them. So...they’re not good
I wish I could give it zero stars. As MANY others have stated. It separates. It's just like rubbing oil all over your face. Do not buy.

Yes, it is unscented, but does not perform as advertised. I like that it's fragrance free and not too oily.
However, this product advertises the following:
- Moisturizes for 24 hours
- Lasts through hand washing
Both of these claims are completely false. I had to apply several times a day and my hands would dry up after washing my hands.
There are better products available.

did not work out for what I needed easy to. Way too much magnification on 10X, did not work out for what I needed
easy to install

Restroom cleaning product. So far been buying products cologne for men. And this is the second time I bought perfume products for my wife. Well this is a first and last never ever again buying perfume for women this stuff smells like restroom cleaning product.keep the stuff away from your food items packaging.

Lasted 2 weeks. Was really excited for this. The first time the product came out nice. I was able to get the brush like strokes. The third time I used it, it seemed to have a hard time coming out, I had to press is hard on my hand a few times. The second week it just smudged color and after that there was barely any product left. I was so confused because it seemed like it was already used and on it’s last life. Would not recommend.
Life is HOT PINK. Hot pink and too opaque for a 'tinted lip balm'.  Looked like a clown.  Went straight in the trash.
Cheaply Made. The attachments break quite easily. Wish I could get my money back.

32 oz not the same. Been using moptop for awhile and love it. I usually buy the 8oz size, I decided to get the 32 oz. because buying in bulk is cheaper. But the product was different.
The gel is usually clear in color with a mild citrus scent. The 32oz size was creamy in color, had a strong citrus scent, and it made a mess of my 3b curly hair. Left a thick sticky residue and it weighed it down. It was awful on my hair.
So I ordered the 8oz size again to compare and it was its normal clear color and consistency. It worked great on my hair. It was clear and not as strong smelling.
The formulation for the bigger size is different than the smaller bottle.
Great product for curls in the smaller 8oz bottle !

Not for me. I tried to use this brush and i was really excited to use it. But when I tried to use it the hot air was blowing out of the bottom and the brush heads wouldn't go through my hair. The handle felt like cheap plastic, i know you get what you pay for but from Revlon i would think it would be better. I need something with harder bristles that go though the air. I wouldn't recommend this IMO

Moisturizing but burns. I’ve tried the regular version of this brand moisturizing socks, they’re FANTASTIC. (Long story short, by those, NOT these!)

I love the original, so I figured these would be even better. They do smell better. But I didn’t see the part about a warming sensation. My feet felt like they were on fire, I had to take them off and rinse my feet in cold water. Which marginally helped. But they come as a pack of two… and so a few weeks later I tried again, on not freshly exfoliated feet. And that’s when I read the warming sensation bit. But still stuck them on my feet, and tried to push through the burning pain to help my sandpaper feet, although I didn’t last too long. The burning, however, lasted for hours.

scam. I love this product, have used it for years. thought it was a good deal to get three of this $7 product for $17. The catch is that you only get one, not 3. Too bad that such a good product is being misrepresented as to the quantity you are buying.

This trimmer is no better than the others I have tried in recent years. This trimmer is no better than the others I have tried in recent years, all Wahl products.  I keep going back to my very old Wahl Trimmer because it works much better than the newer ones, even tho it even lost its little spring!!  The only difference I can see between the old one and the newer ones is the length of the razor slits.  The new ones are shorter and apparently less successful at trimming! I really wish Wahl would re-issue the longer slit Trimmer!  Why stop producing what works?!!!

Dammaged from poor packaging.. The product was placed loosely in an over sized box with styrofoam. Upon opening the box I became covered in small pieces of shredded styrofoam which were stuck everywhere and presented to be a huge pain in the butt to clean up. The boards we're loose in the box and clearly shifted quite a bit and tore up the styrofoam.

Because everything was wrapped so loosely the boards have many dings and scratches.

I built it anyway because I am in a hurry to use it...

I absolutely love the counter itself! The only reason this review has 1 star is because, it's a really big deal that shipping was not handled correctly. The product arrived way too damaged. However, The surface design was made beautifully and the structure was sound! Construction was extremely simple. There were a couple of mix-ups due to the fact that the instructions were poor photo quality with little to no description. It even came with a cute little screwdriver that I will probably use again.

The only problem I had with the structure is that the screws and placement of holes for mounting to the wall are a joke. Molly bolts would be much better in case you don't have studs and because the holes are located where they are I was not able to get the counter to line up flush with the wall. I'd recommend that you find your studs and either screw through the counter where you need to rather then in the holes predrilled and closer to the top of the counter so that you can make it flush with the wall. An alternative idea would be to attach a 2x4 or some other sized board to your wall holding in the studs and attach the counter to it
Wish it stuck better to my tub. Great idea but it doesn’t stick to my tub that well.

So tiny, not what I expected. So tiny.....I obviously didn't read the dimensions first.  Reading the description, it mentions "bracelet" I was expecting this to be the size of my current hair ring, which is quite a bit larger, as I am able to wear it around my wrist like a bracelet. So, I assumed by the title description, this would be the same.  However, it is more like a "ring" size and fits on my finger. Don't waste your money!. Bought these for my 84 yr old dad who doesn't want to go to the barber shop due to covid. Thought I would try them out on my hair first.
